source: platform observability emitted by src/screens/accountant/accountantPaymentReportPdf.service.ts and asserted by src/screens/accountant/accountantPaymentReportPdf.service.test.ts
limitations: Browser route proof used a temp accountant user with no seeded payment rows, so the browser did not click a real PDF button.
The PDF repeat/warm timing contract is proven through product telemetry emitted by the exact accountant payment report service and enforced in targeted Jest.
